page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.3xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance configured under the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 92.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 7.67 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, it includes a single NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 32 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, and network connectivity is established with a baseline bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear division between CPU and GPU capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, placing in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and the bottom 10% for Geekbench. Multi-core performance, however, reaches average tiers across stress-ng, Passmark, and Geekbench suites. The system's primary strength lies in GPU-driven tasks, demonstrated by top-tier LLM inference speeds. Prompt processing for both 135M and 7B models ranks in the top 10%, with 7B model text generation achieving 114.19 tokens per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn6e-c12g1.3xlarge represents a specialized resource allocation. The inclusion of a dedicated enterprise GPU makes it a cost-effective choice for parallel processing and machine learning inference compared to general-purpose instances, though the trade-off is lower single-threaded CPU efficiency. This profile makes the instance highly suitable for medium-scale deep learning inference, AI model execution, and parallel scientific computations, while it is less suited for single-threaded CPU-bound applications or workloads requiring high local storage IOPS.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.3xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance designed for parallel computing workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 12 dedicated vCPUs and 92.0 GB of RAM, the server features a dedicated NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 32 GB of VRAM. While single-core CPU benchmarks place in the lower percentiles, multi-core performance remains average, and GPU-accelerated LLM inference benchmarks show top-tier results for small and medium models. The instance lacks local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for specialized parallel processing, making it highly suitable for machine learning inference, scientific simulations, and GPU-driven data processing workloads where single-threaded CPU performance is not the primary bottleneck.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.3xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 92 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 32 GB VRAM, optimized for machine learning inference.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring dedicated Intel processors and an NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU for parallel computing and machine learning inference.

Dedicated NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 32 GB of VRAM
Top-tier LLM inference performance for small and medium models
5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Best suited for machine learning, parallel processing, and scientific computing
